Hero.subtitle: Sign up your students. Menta generates the plan, supports them day by day with a virtual mentor and produces the final reports.
Hero.stat_reports: reports ready to share with schools

Mentor.subtitle: Your company feeds the mentor with your way of working, tools and processes. From there it supports your interns every day, without your team spending hours on each one.
Mentor.feature_setup_title: The company sets it up once
Mentor.feature_setup_desc: Company description, tone, tools, internal rules and useful links.
Mentor.feature_chat_title: The student talks to it when needed
Mentor.feature_chat_desc: Resolves doubts, plans the day, unblocks problems and reminds deadlines.
Mentor.feature_summary_desc: No need to answer a thousand questions: you review the automatic evaluation and sign the reports.
Mentor.chat_msg1: Hi Lucía 👋 Today you're starting the login screen. You have the mock in Figma (link coming) and the Button component is already in /components/ui.
Mentor.chat_msg2: And to connect with the auth API?
Mentor.chat_msg3: In our company we use Supabase Auth. You have the useAuth() hook in /lib/auth.ts. If you get stuck for more than 30 min, ask Ana (CTO) for a review.
Mentor.chat_caption: The mentor responds with the knowledge your company has configured.

Features.title: Everything you need to run internships
Features.subtitle: A platform designed for companies hosting interns or who want to train their own team internally.
Features.f1_desc: Feed the mentor your company info, tools and processes. It will guide students so you don't have to.
Features.f2_desc: Menta generates phases, tasks and deliverables from the student's info. You review and approve.
Features.f3_desc: Milestones, deadlines, meetings and deliveries appear on both the student's calendar and yours.
Features.f4_desc: The student logs their daily work. That activity feeds evaluation, reports and final memo automatically.
Features.f5_desc: Menta detects delays, computes progress and proposes an evidence-based evaluation. No spreadsheets.
Features.f6_desc: Generate reports for the company, school or student memo. Ready to print or save as PDF.

HowItWorks.title: How Menta works
HowItWorks.subtitle: 5 steps to automate internship management in your company.
HowItWorks.s1_desc: Tell the mentor what your company does, which tools you use and how you work. Once, valid for all your students.
HowItWorks.s2_desc: Internship type (vocational, university or internal training), dates and tutor info. Menta adapts to each case.
HowItWorks.s3_desc: Click a button. Menta creates phases, tasks and deadlines. You review, tweak and approve.
HowItWorks.s4_title: The student works with the mentor
HowItWorks.s4_desc: Every day the student checks their tasks, talks to the mentor when stuck, uploads deliverables and logs activity.
HowItWorks.s5_desc: Menta gives you an automatic evaluation and reports ready for the company, the school and the student's memo.

Audience.title: For any type of internship or training
Audience.subtitle: The same flow adapts to vocational training, university or internal training students. No reconfiguration needed.
Audience.fp_desc: Agreements, training plan, insurance, evaluations and memo — all guided by the mentor.
Audience.univ_desc: Main project, academic tutor, memo and defense. No vocational paperwork, no unnecessary forms.
Audience.internal_desc: Onboarding new hires, learning new tools or team training.

Talent.subtitle: Students already gain professional visibility from their portal. And you can launch open challenges to discover candidates before they start job hunting.
Talent.linkedin_desc: Whenever the student solves a problem or completes a project they can create a milestone with a professional preview to share on LinkedIn. Companies can also write endorsements that the student publishes as a portfolio.
Talent.challenges_desc: Publish a temporary 1-month open challenge. Students and trainees sign up, send their proposal and the standout ones stay on your radar. You decide who to reach out to.
Talent.challenges_b3: Public challenge page with LinkedIn preview
Talent.challenges_b4: Automatic summary of standout applicants at close

Pricing.title: Start free. Pick the plan that fits.
Pricing.subtitle: 1 month free trial on any plan. No lock-in. Cancel anytime.
Pricing.custom_hint: Let's talk and build your plan.
Pricing.footnote: All prices without VAT. Additional students: €49/year above the ones included in each plan.
Pricing.plan_pro_tagline: For companies training several students a year.
Pricing.plan_custom_tagline: For large companies with specific needs.

Faq.title: Frequently asked questions
Faq.q1: What exactly is the virtual mentor?
Faq.a1: It's an assistant that supports the student day by day (questions, planning, unblocking). The company sets it up once with its info (how you work, tools, rules, resources) and from there it serves all your students without the human tutor spending time.
Faq.q2: Does it replace the human company tutor?
Faq.a2: No. The tutor still exists as final reference and signs legal documents. But the day-to-day (questions, planning, technical doubts) is absorbed by the virtual mentor. You decide which topics get routed to the human.
Faq.q3: Is the platform only for vocational internships?
Faq.a3: No. Menta is designed for company-side internships: vocational students, university students and even internal training (onboarding, new tools, team training). The flow adapts to the type.
Faq.q4: Is a formal training plan (PFI) required?
Faq.a4: Only if the student comes from a vocational training center. Not requested for other tracks.
Faq.q5: How does the free trial work?
Faq.a5: 1 month with full access to every feature, no credit card. After that you can subscribe to the annual plan or keep consulting your data in read-only mode for 30 more days.
Faq.a6: Base plan €690/year + VAT covers up to 2 students. Pro plan €1200/year covers up to 10. Each additional student €49/year + VAT. No lock-in.
Faq.a7: Yes. Everything is hosted on European servers compliant with GDPR. We run daily backups and never share your data with third parties.
Faq.q8: Can I export my data if I leave the platform?
Faq.a8: Of course. You can export students, documents, evaluations and reports in PDF and Excel at any time.

FinalCta.title: Start today. Your team will thank you.
FinalCta.subtitle: Set up Menta in less than 30 minutes and free your company tutor from repetitive internship tasks.

Legal.common_intro: This document applies to the website menta-theta.vercel.app and the Menta platform, owned by Gobe Soluciones y Consultoría, SL.

LegalNotice.title: Legal notice
LegalNotice.intro: In compliance with article 10 of Spanish Law 34/2002 on Information Society Services and Electronic Commerce (LSSI-CE), users are informed that the owner of this website is:
LegalNotice.s_object_p1: This website presents Menta, a SaaS platform for managing company internships, aimed at companies and, by invitation, their interns.
LegalNotice.s_object_p2: Access to the website is free. Use of the Menta platform requires registration and acceptance of the Terms of Service.
LegalNotice.s_use_p1: Users agree to lawful use of the site and platform, in accordance with applicable laws, and undertake not to cause damage to the owner or to third parties.
LegalNotice.s_use_p2: Use for unlawful, harmful purposes or that may damage the site's operation or reputation is prohibited.
LegalNotice.s_ip_p1: All site content (texts, images, code, logos, trademarks, graphic design) is owned by Gobe Soluciones y Consultoría, SL or by third parties who have authorised its use.
LegalNotice.s_ip_p2: Reproduction, distribution, public communication or transformation, in whole or in part, is prohibited without express authorisation from the owner.
LegalNotice.s_liability_p1: The owner is not liable for damages arising from improper use of the site or temporary unavailability of the platform for maintenance or force majeure.
LegalNotice.s_liability_p2: The site may contain links to third-party sites. The owner is not responsible for the content or privacy practices of such sites.
LegalNotice.s_links_p1: External links are provided for informational purposes only. The owner assumes no responsibility for their content.
LegalNotice.s_law_p1: This legal notice is governed by Spanish law. Any disputes arising from the use of the site shall be submitted to the Courts of Madrid, unless applicable regulations provide otherwise.

Privacy.title: Privacy policy
Privacy.intro: Gobe Soluciones y Consultoría, SL (hereinafter "Gobe") is the controller of the personal data collected through the website and the Menta platform. This policy describes what data we process, for what purpose, under which legal basis, and your rights as a user, in accordance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR) and Spanish Organic Law 3/2018 on Personal Data Protection.
Privacy.s_responsable_text: The controller's contact details are listed above.
Privacy.s_dpo_text: You can reach the controller at info@gobesoluciones.com for any matter related to the processing of your data.
Privacy.s_data_p1: We collect and process the following data according to user type:
Privacy.s_data_b1: Registered companies: company name, tax ID, address, contact person details (name, email), payment data managed by Stripe.
Privacy.s_data_b2: Students invited by companies: name and surname, email, phone (optional), academic data, activity log, deliverables, conversations with the virtual mentor.
Privacy.s_data_b3: Open challenge applicants: name, email, phone (optional), LinkedIn (optional), education (optional), challenge submission, explicit consent to share data with the organising company.
Privacy.s_data_b4: Navigation data: IP address, browser type, preferred language, technical logs.
Privacy.s_purpose_b1: Provision of the Menta service (internship management, virtual mentor, evaluation, reports).
Privacy.s_purpose_b2: Management of the contractual relationship with the client company (billing, support).
Privacy.s_purpose_b4: For challenge applicants: enable the organising company to assess the candidate, provided the applicant has expressly consented to share their data.
Privacy.s_purpose_b5: Product improvement through anonymised or aggregated data.
Privacy.s_legal_b1: Performance of the contract with the client company (art. 6.1.b GDPR).
Privacy.s_legal_b2: Express consent of the data subject in the case of challenge applicants (art. 6.1.a GDPR).
Privacy.s_legal_b3: Compliance with applicable legal obligations (art. 6.1.c GDPR).
Privacy.s_legal_b4: Legitimate interest of the controller to improve the service and security (art. 6.1.f GDPR).
Privacy.s_retention_p1: Data will be kept for the duration of the contractual relationship and thereafter for the legally required periods to address potential liabilities (up to 6 years for tax matters).
Privacy.s_retention_p2: Data of open challenge applicants will be kept for a maximum of 12 months after the challenge closes, unless additional consent is given for future selection processes.
Privacy.s_processors_p1: To deliver the service, Menta uses the following providers as data processors, with corresponding agreements in place:
Privacy.s_processors_b1: Supabase Inc. (database storage and authentication, servers in the European Union — Paris, France).
Privacy.s_processors_b3: Stripe Payments Europe, Ltd. (payment processing; card data is never stored by Gobe).
Privacy.s_processors_b4: Transactional email providers for invitations and notifications.
Privacy.s_transfers_p1: Some processors may be based outside the European Economic Area. In such cases, transfers are carried out under appropriate safeguards in line with the GDPR (Standard Contractual Clauses approved by the European Commission).
Privacy.s_rights_p1: As a data subject, you have the right to access, rectify, erase, object to processing, restrict, request portability and withdraw consent, as well as to lodge a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Agency (www.aepd.es).
Privacy.s_rights_p2: To exercise these rights you can write to info@gobesoluciones.com with "Data protection" in the subject, attaching a copy of an ID document.
Privacy.s_minors_p1: The platform is aimed at companies, training centres and students aged 14 or older. For underage students, the educational centre and/or the company guarantee they have obtained the legally required authorisations before adding the student to the platform.
Privacy.s_security_p1: We apply appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect personal data against loss, misuse and unauthorised access: encryption in transit (HTTPS), role-based access control (RLS at database level), daily backups and periodic review of safeguards.

Cookies.title: Cookies policy
Cookies.intro: This policy explains which cookies the Menta website and platform use, for what purpose, and how you can manage them.
Cookies.s_what_p1: A cookie is a small text file that a website saves to your device when you visit it. It allows it to remember information about your visit (language, preferences, logged-in session) and helps the service work.
Cookies.s_types_p1: Menta only uses strictly necessary cookies for the operation of the service. We do not use advertising or third-party tracking cookies for commercial purposes.
Cookies.c1_purpose: Keep the user session active on the platform.
Cookies.c2_purpose: Remember the chosen language (Spanish or English).
Cookies.s_third_p1: Some providers we use (Stripe for payments, Supabase for authentication) may set strictly necessary cookies for the operation of their services. We do not use third-party analytics or advertising cookies.
Cookies.s_manage_p1: You can configure your browser to accept, reject or delete cookies. Be aware that rejecting technical cookies may prevent the service from working (you will not be able to log in).
Cookies.s_manage_p2: Links to the cookie management pages of the main browsers: Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge.
Cookies.s_changes_p1: This policy may be updated to reflect changes in legislation or how the service works. Any changes will be published on this page.

Terms.title: Terms of service
Terms.intro: These terms govern access to and use of the Menta platform (the "Service"), provided by Gobe Soluciones y Consultoría, SL ("Gobe"). By registering and using the Service, you accept these terms in full.
Terms.s_object_p1: Menta is a Software as a Service (SaaS) for end-to-end management of company internships: internship plan, virtual mentor, evaluation, reports and student portfolio. It also includes optional talent attraction features through open challenges.
Terms.s_account_p1: Registration is aimed at companies and self-employed professionals with legal capacity to contract. Students access by invitation from their company.
Terms.s_account_p2: The client company is responsible for keeping its data up to date and for the confidentiality of its users' credentials.
Terms.s_account_p3: Gobe may suspend the account in case of serious breach of these terms or fraudulent use of the Service.
Terms.s_subscription_p1: Menta offers different plans (Base, Pro, Custom) with monthly or annual billing. Prices are stated without VAT, which will be added under applicable law.
Terms.s_subscription_p2: The free trial lasts 1 month from registration, no credit card required.
Terms.s_subscription_p3: Subscriptions renew automatically at the end of each period. You can cancel at any time from the customer portal; the subscription will remain active until the end of the already-billed period.
Terms.s_subscription_p4: Amounts paid are non-refundable unless applicable consumer law requires otherwise (the offer is aimed at companies, not consumers).
Terms.s_challenges_p1: Companies can publish 1 free challenge per calendar year. Additional challenges cost €84 + VAT each. Challenges last up to 1 month from start date.
Terms.s_challenges_p2: Applicants explicitly decide whether to share their data with the organising company for recruitment purposes. The company may not use data from applicants who have not provided consent.
Terms.s_use_p1: You agree not to use the Service for: (a) unlawful activities; (b) storing illegal, offensive content or content that infringes third-party rights; (c) attempting unauthorised access to parts of the Service that are not yours; (d) reverse engineering or copying the code.
Terms.s_data_p1: Data entered into the platform (students, documents, deliverables, etc.) belongs to the client company. Gobe acts as data processor under the privacy policy.
Terms.s_data_p2: The company can export its data at any time. After cancellation, data is kept for 30 days in read-only mode before permanent deletion.
Terms.s_ip_p1: The software, brand, designs and content of Menta are the exclusive property of Gobe. The subscription grants the client a right to use the Service, not ownership of it.
Terms.s_warranty_p1: Gobe provides the Service "as is" and will use reasonable efforts to keep it available and secure. We do not guarantee the absence of interruptions or fitness for specific client purposes.
Terms.s_warranty_p2: Except for wilful misconduct or gross negligence, Gobe's liability is limited to the amount actually paid by the client in the 12 months prior to the event giving rise to the claim.
Terms.s_changes_p1: Gobe may modify the Service or these terms for operational, legal or improvement reasons. Material changes will be communicated at least 30 days in advance. If the client does not accept the changes, they may cancel without penalty.
Terms.s_law_p1: These terms are governed by Spanish law. For any dispute, the parties submit to the Courts of Madrid, unless applicable law provides otherwise.
